Notes: Verified at 300 DPI on 2026-07-03: the invalid form XObject references missing /CS0. pdfe preserves the default black color while Poppler/Ghostscript recover as gray; this is malformed-input recovery, not proof that pdfe is better than references.

Target.Reason: The fixture is intentionally invalid: its form XObject uses /CS0 without defining that resource. pdfe boundedly renders with default black; Poppler/Ghostscript recover as gray; MuPDF refuses.

1.QualityReason: Accepted malformed-input recovery difference on an invalid PDF/A fixture; do not classify as pdfe better than references.
1.Notes: Reviewed against current pdfe, MuPDF, Cairo, and Ghostscript renders.
